originalTitle: 'The weapons were loud, but there was always music': Sudanese band play on through the war
title: 'The weapons were loud, but there was always music': Sudanese band play on through the war
content: One of Sudan's most popular bands, Aswat Almadina, recall being in the studio when the war broke out three years ago.

originalTitle: Millions listen to Ethiopian star's song taking swipe at government
title: Teddy Afro's New Song: Let's All Be Friends!
content:
A Famous Voice from Ethiopia

Hello, super friends! We have some exciting news from a beautiful country in Africa called Ethiopia. Imagine a big star, someone who sings amazing songs that make everyone happy. His name is Teddy Afro, and he is super famous in Ethiopia! Many, many people love his music. He has a new song out, and it has a very special message for everyone. Teddy Afro's new song is like a gentle whisper, asking all the people in his country to be kind to each other and work together like one big, happy family. It’s a song about friendship and making Ethiopia an even happier place for everyone.

Who is Teddy Afro?

Teddy Afro is not just any singer; he is a superstar! His real name is Tewodros Kassahun, but everyone calls him Teddy Afro. He sings beautiful songs that make people want to dance, smile, and sometimes even think about important things. He has a wonderful voice, and his music often tells stories about Ethiopia's past, its beautiful land, and its amazing people. Imagine if your favourite singer released a song that made you feel like you could do anything, or that you should be extra kind to your friends. That's how many people feel about Teddy Afro's music. He makes people feel proud of their country and hopeful for the future. Did you know? Music is a very important part of life in Africa! People use music to celebrate, tell stories, and even teach important lessons, just like Teddy Afro is doing.

What Does 'Unity' Mean?

Teddy Afro's new song talks about something called 'unity'. What does unity mean? It means everyone coming together, being friends, and helping each other. Think about when you play with your friends. If you all work together to build a tall tower with blocks, that's unity! If you share your toys and make sure everyone gets a turn, that's unity too. When people have unity, they feel strong together. They listen to each other, they help each other when someone is sad, and they celebrate happy times together. It’s like being part of a super team where everyone supports each other. What happens when there is no unity? Sometimes, people might feel lonely, or they might not help each other. Teddy Afro wants everyone in Ethiopia to feel like one big team, full of friends helping friends.

His New Song: A Message of Kindness

Teddy Afro's new song, which we can call 'Together We Grow Strong!' (even though it has a different name in his language), is a beautiful melody. It sounds happy and makes you want to listen carefully to the words. In the song, he gently tells people that when they work together, their country can become even stronger and more beautiful. He sings about how special Ethiopia is, with all its different people, languages, and cultures. And he reminds everyone that even though people might be different, they can still be great friends and help each other. It’s like a rainbow – lots of different colours, but together they make something amazing! Did you know? Ethiopia has over 80 different languages! But music, like Teddy Afro's songs, can be understood and loved by people who speak all those different languages. Music brings people together, no matter what language they speak!

Why is This Song Important?

When a famous person like Teddy Afro sings a song with such an important message, many, many people listen. It's not just a song to dance to; it’s a song that makes people think. It makes them think about how they can be better friends, better neighbours, and better helpers in their communities. Imagine if your favourite teacher told everyone in your class that being kind makes the classroom a happier place. You would all try extra hard to be kind, right? It's the same with Teddy Afro's song. When he sings about unity, it helps people remember how important it is to work together. His song is like a big, warm hug for the whole country, reminding everyone to be kind, to share, and to help build a happy future together. It makes people feel hopeful and encourages them to be the best friends and helpers they can be.

How Can We Show Unity?

We can all learn from Teddy Afro's song! Even in your own life, you can show unity every day. How? By sharing your toys with your friends, by helping your grown-ups at home, by being kind to everyone at school, and by listening when someone else is talking. When you play a game with your friends, try to help everyone have fun, not just yourself. When you see someone looking sad, ask them if they need help. These little things make a big difference and show that you understand what unity means. Did you know? Ethiopia is famous for its amazing long-distance runners! These runners often train together and cheer each other on, showing great teamwork and unity even in sports!

Looking Forward with Hope

Teddy Afro's new song gives everyone in Ethiopia a lot of hope. It reminds them that by working together and being kind to each other, they can make their country shine even brighter. It’s a beautiful message from a wonderful singer, and it shows that music can do amazing things, like helping people remember to be friends and build a happy world together. So let's all try to be united, just like Teddy Afro sings!
